---
name: Bug report / Feature request
about: Report a bug or request a feature for Gline Niagara modules
title: '[Module Name] Brief description'
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

**Which module does this relate to?**
e.g. Niagara4-MQTTClient, Niagara-bogsnap, Niagara-Rest-API-service

**Describe the issue or request**
A clear description of what you're experiencing or what you'd like added.

**Niagara version:**
e.g. 4.14.0.162

**Additional context**
Screenshots, error messages, or configuration details help.
